name: Yejide Adeyemi
occupation: fabric quality inspector at a garment factory
ordinary_life_state: Yejide has moved into a supervisory cubicle at the garment factory with her name on the glass. When a production line stalls, the floor supervisor brings the problem to her, and she identifies the missing cotton shipment that everyone else overlooked while cataloguing visible data.

life_progression.state: Yejide has moved into a supervisory cubicle at the garment factory with her name on the glass.
